attempts.test_code:
import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_knapsack_exact_weight_bug():
    """Test that reveals bug where items with weight exactly equal to capacity are excluded."""
    # Bug: weight < j should be weight <= j
    # This case uses an item that exactly fills the capacity
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    
    # The optimal solution should be to take the (3, 10) item
    # which exactly fills the capacity with value 10
    # Alternative would be three (1, 5) items but we only have one
    expected_value = 10
    
    result = source.knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == expected_value, f"Expected {expected_value}, got {result}"
